description:
This 10 minute booty pilates workout is perfect to effectively tone your glutes, hamstrings, and inner thighs. Through a combination of Pilates booty exercises, this Boho Beautiful class will help you firm, lift, and sculpt your butt and lower body like never before. 

Do these exercises every day and see the difference! 

Class Instructor: Juliana Spicoluk
Video Production: Mark Spicoluk
